description: WhatsApp MCP. SQLCipher-encrypted, scrubber-CI-gated, draft-and-confirm sends, voice transcription.
name: io.github.adelaidasofia/whatsapp-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Hostname for the Go bridge REST API.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_BRIDGE_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Port for the Go bridge REST API.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_BRIDGE_PORT

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a vault CRM folder for auto-injection (e.g., Obsidian 'CRM/'). When unset, CRM injection is disabled.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_VAULT_CRM_PATH

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key. Required only when WHATSAPP_WHISPER_BACKEND=openai-api.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_WHISPER_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: whisper.cpp model name. Only used when backend is local-cpp.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_WHISPER_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Strip known prompt-injection patterns from incoming messages before the LLM sees them.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_SCRUB_PROMPT_INJECTION

environmentVariables.description: Log every tool call to audit.log.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_AUDIT_LOG

environmentVariables.description: Enable SQLCipher DB encryption with the key sourced from macOS Keychain.
environmentVariables.name: WHATSAPP_ENCRYPT_DB

title: WhatsApp MCP
